title: Slack admin audit-log event
description: One workspace admin audit-log entry from the Slack audit-logs API. Admin-action METADATA only (what action, who, when, what entity) — never message content or the body of any object Slack acted on (slice 443 threat-model I). One record per audit entry; idempotency anchors on the immutable entry id.

entry_id.description: Slack audit-log entry id — also the idempotency anchor.

action.description: Audit action discriminator, e.g. user_login, channel_archive, role_change.

actor_id.description: Slack user id of the actor that took the action (opaque id).

actor_email.description: Actor email as reported by the Slack audit API — the access-review join key.

entity_type.description: Type of entity acted on: workspace | channel | user | app | file | ...

date_create.description: Slack epoch-seconds timestamp of the event.
